subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath hearkened to the Call and turned unto the Most Exalted Horizon, who hath attained, witnessed and beheld [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع الندآء و اقبل الی الافق الاعلی حضر و شهد و رای
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
